assertions.text: Opens with a concrete hook, not credentials
Central argument stated by end of second paragraph
At least one counterargument acknowledged and addressed

concrete-hook.note: Opens with a concrete observation about council finance spreadsheets or budget forecast failures

thesis-by-para-2.note: Argument clear by paragraph 2: public money deserves AI forecasting tools

counterargument.note: Counterargument addressed: concerns about AI replacing human judgment in public finance

concrete-hook.note: Opens with concrete image or anecdote about the arts centre

thesis-by-para-2.note: Argument: arts funding is economic infrastructure, not luxury — stated by paragraph 2

counterargument.note: Counterargument: other public services compete for the same money

concrete-hook.note: Opens with specific data point about cross-border research efficiency

thesis-by-para-2.note: Argument: EU must fund health research as infrastructure not project grants — by paragraph 2

counterargument.note: Counterargument: national sovereignty over healthcare systems
